ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data series */,
  "series_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the data series */,
  "period" REAL /* Period of the data (e.g., 2011.06) */,
  "data_value" INTEGER /* Value of the data */,
  "suppressed" TEXT /* Whether the data is suppressed or not */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., R) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the data (e.g., Number) */,
  "magnitude" INTEGER /* Magnitude of the data (e.g., 0) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "temporal_coverage" TEXT /* Temporal coverage of the data (e.g., 2010-2020) */,
  "geographic_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the data (e.g., national, regional) */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the data belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the data belongs to */,
  "series_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_series_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_title_id") REFERENCES series_titles ("series_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Business Data Collection - BDC) */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Industry by employment variable) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_titles" (
  "series_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series title */,
  "series_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the series title (e.g., Filled jobs, Agriculture, Forestry and Fishing) */,
  "series_title_description" TEXT /* Description of the series title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_subjects" (
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between the data series and subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_series_id", "subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_groups" (
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between the data series and group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_series_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_series_titles" (
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series */,
  "series_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series title */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between the data series and series title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_series_id", "series_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data series */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data series was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_versions_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series the note belongs to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_notes_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_tags_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_comments_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)
